projects.title: rymo
projects.description: A local-first knowledge canvas inspired by Miro for building, arranging, and connecting notes, links, and media — fully offline. Uses a custom JSON encoder/decoder for portable, interoperable boards stored entirely on disk.

projects.title: Hack The Change 2024 | 2nd Place
projects.description: 2nd place at Hack The Change 2024 among 50+ teams. Built a mental health app with an LLM that classifies user journals by tone and theme, plus a content moderation filter to keep the community safe.

projects.title: Blog Website
projects.description: A modern, responsive blog template built with Next.js, MDX, and Tailwind CSS. This template includes a dark mode toggle, tag-based navigation, collections, search functionality, and more. I use this currently for my own blog!

projects.title: Social Discord Bot
projects.description: A bot made for Discord servers that listens for social media updates such as Tweets, going live on Twitch and Youtube posts. It can also post custom messages at a certain time of the day. There is also a voting system where users can react to the message to cast their votes.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: This site was made to display my projects and a short about me! (you're looking right at it!).

experiences.description: Worked on C#/.NET backend and React frontend, full stack development. Built a JavaScript rule sandbox that replaced a time-consuming process. Also built a Python + LLM knowledge base that accelerated rule development ~5x and enabled teams to share accurate technical docs with clients.

Delivered 30+ complex insurance rules in the company's proprietary JavaScript rules engine, increasing client product development speed by ~50%. Also built an internal documentation website covering API guides and reference material.

Developed custom websites, Discord bots, and scripts for 5+ clients serving 10,000+ users. Squashed 50+ critical bugs contributing to a 30% improvement in user satisfaction, and automated workflows reducing manual processing time by ~75%.

Architected a Kotlin mobile app GUI and built a Node.js backend to handle WebRTC peer-to-peer communication. Automated camera feed transmission to RTSP servers, eliminating 100% of manual media storage intervention.
